nasb.text: “Do not drink wine or strong drink, neither you nor your sons with you, when you come into the tent of meeting, so that you will not die—it is a perpetual statute throughout your generations—

esv.text: “Drink no wine or strong drink, you or your sons with you, when you go into the tent of meeting, lest you die. It shall be a statute forever throughout your generations.

cnv.text: “你和你的兒子一起進會幕的時候，淡酒烈酒都不可喝，免得你們死亡，這要作你們世世代代永遠的律例；

ccb.text: “你和你儿子们进会幕前，淡酒烈酒都不可喝，否则你们都会死。你们世世代代都要遵守这永远的条例。
